name: Flour Mills C. Sarantopoulos S.A.
summary: Flour Mills C. Sarantopoulos S.A. produces and sells flour and semolina in Greece. It offers bakery flour, luxury flour, durum wheat flour, and flour for industrial companies. The company also offers by-products, such as brans, buns, special bits, and alps to livestock cooperatives and feed industries. It serves customers in biscuit, bakery, and pasta industries. Flour Mills C. Sarantopoulos S.A. was founded in 1912 and is headquartered in Keratsini, Greece.
